decisions.rationale: IR and drsam-99657.bubble re-read confirm named ui_ref static copy: ai_RNbBHYZI Admin Dashboard, ai_RNbBHYZJ analytics disclaimer, ai_RNbBHYZT Guided Paths, ai_RNbBHYZr Resources — SettingsAdminShell/AdminPathsTab/AdminResourcesTab paraphrase to Admin console, shortened subtitle, Guided paths, and Resource library. Valid ui-fidelity gap on in-scope ui_refs, but criteria_audit AC-1..AC-3, functional_audit FV-1..FV-5, and ui_evidence all pass with markers present; SET-09 ACs gate shell/grids/popups not literal Bubble strings. Downstream SET-10-admin-plans-workplaces-analytics depends_on SET-09 sub-tab shell state, not header copy. Batch ~4 string alignments as SET-09 IR copy polish alongside C-2 (same pattern as SET-01/SET-03 deferred copy parity).

IR re-read confirms style_ref:ai_RNbBHYZI resolves to Text_heading_2_ while SettingsAdminShell admin-card-title applies bubbleStyle(Text_heading_3_); panel titles ai_RNbBHYZT/ai_RNbBHYZr correctly use Text_heading_3_ per IR. Review ui_evidence marks ai_RNbBHYZI pass with typography note; criteria_audit passes. Typography token mismatch is polish only and does not block SET-10 or functional gates. Switch ai_RNbBHYZI to bubbleStyle(Text_heading_2_) in the same SET-09 visual-parity batch as C-1.

Confirmed: adminResourcesApi fetchAdminResources returns STATIC_FALLBACK (DEMO_RESOURCE_SEED) when resource table is unavailable and onboarding_data is empty; deleteAdminResource only mutates onboarding_data rows, so static seed deletes toast success but rows reappear on reload. AdminPathsTab already guards isStatic paths — resources lack isStatic flag and AdminResourcesTab does not disable delete on dataSource static. Valid functional edge case in brownfield fallback mode only; FV-4 passes on handler wiring; table/onboarding paths delete correctly. Does not block SET-10 depends_on gate. Mirror path isStatic pattern or tombstone tracking (~15 lines) — defer to SET-09 admin API fallback hardening batch (aligned with SET-07 deferred catalog-fallback resilience).

Coverage preflight.existing_files_found lists unrelated paths catalog helpers (pathsResourcesApi.ts, paths.ts) while omitting SettingsAdminShell, AdminPathsTab, AdminResourcesTab, and admin API modules actually created per files_changed and criteria evidence. Artifact hygiene only — criteria all pass at 100%, no implement blocker, no AC regression. Refresh preflight listing on next coverage pass for SET-09 (same pattern as SET-02/SET-04 deferred stale preflight.gaps).

summary: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 Bubble static copy alignment on ai_RNbBHYZI/ZJ/ZT/Zr (SET-09 IR copy polish); C-2 Text_heading_2_ on admin card title ai_RNbBHYZI (same polish batch); C-3 static-fallback resource delete false-success — mirror path isStatic guard (SET-09 admin API fallback hardening); C-4 stale coverage preflight existing_files_found (refresh on next coverage run). ok_to_advance=true, rewrite_required=false.
